name: Calculadora de Préstamo
desc: Calcula la cuota mensual de cualquier préstamo personal o de consumo.
description: Calcula la cuota mensual de cualquier préstamo personal o de consumo.
seo_title: Calculadora de Préstamo – Cuota Mensual Online
seo_description: Calcula la cuota mensual de un préstamo personal. Introduce capital, interés y plazo para obtener el resultado. Obten resultados al instante con.
example_label: Calculating monthly payment for a €15,750 personal loan at 6.75% annual interest over 36 months.
result_context: The cuota_mensual of {cuota_mensual} is your fixed monthly loan payment. You will pay {total_intereses} in interest over the life of the loan.

steps.description: Convert annual interest rate to monthly

mistakes: Confusing annual interest rate with monthly rate in calculations
Not considering early repayment penalties that may apply
Overlooking the total cost of borrowing beyond monthly payments
